title: Zero Shaders
description: This shader pack makes everything except players, particles, arrows, and ender pearls gray.
body:
# Zero Shaders

![visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72bc6435983eba3f9e2887ff7d3c3ffbad89f6ad_0.webp)
## About the shader pack:
The "Zero Shader" turns everything except players, particles, arrows, and Ender Pearls gray.

More details:
Bright elements on the player model have been replaced with a poisonous pink color (this also affects items and player armor).

Arrows are now white, and spectral arrows are a bright, poisonous pink.

The sky is completely white, both day and night.

Particles are also now a poisonous pink, which is very unusual for PvP.

FPS drops are minimal on medium settings.

This is a great option for those who enjoy dark themes and want to try something completely new.
Need: **Optifine** or **Iris Shaders**
